introSection: Steel Eel is a Morgan roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It opened on March 6, 1999.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Unlike other Morgan hyper coasters, Steel Eel uses tubular supports (as opposed to a lattice structure) throughout the whole ride. Steel Eel opened with yellow track and turquoise supports. It was repainted in 2019 by Baynum Solutions and the color of the supports was changed to purple.

fullText:
Steel Eel is a Morgan roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It opened on March 6, 1999.

Unlike other Morgan hyper coasters, Steel Eel uses tubular supports (as opposed to a lattice structure) throughout the whole ride. Steel Eel opened with yellow track and turquoise supports. It was repainted in 2019 by Baynum Solutions and the color of the supports was changed to purple.
